vocab.meaning: dẫn dắt, tiên phong thực hiện một dự án
vocab.example: My primary role involves spearheading a project focused on digital transformation within the marketing department.

vocab.meaning: giữ mối liên lạc, làm việc trực tiếp với (đối tác/phòng ban)
vocab.example: I frequently liaise with overseas clients to ensure that their technical requirements are met with precision.

vocab.meaning: giám sát các hoạt động vận hành
vocab.example: As a senior manager, I oversee the daily operations of the logistics team to guarantee maximum efficiency.

vocab.meaning: giải quyết, khắc phục các sự cố/vấn đề kỹ thuật
vocab.example: Part of my responsibility is to troubleshoot complex software issues that arise during the deployment phase.

vocab.meaning: đảm bảo sự tuân thủ (quy định/luật lệ)
vocab.example: It is my duty to ensure compliance with strict industry safety standards across all our manufacturing sites.

vocab.meaning: phân bổ nguồn lực (nhân sự/ngân sách)
vocab.example: I am tasked with having to allocate resources effectively to keep our various quarterly campaigns on budget.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy sự cộng tác/làm việc nhóm
vocab.example: I strive to foster collaboration between the creative and analytical teams to produce more holistic strategies.

vocab.meaning: tối ưu hóa, tinh giản các quy trình
vocab.example: One of my key achievements was helping to streamline internal processes, which cut down administrative time by 20%.

vocab.meaning: báo cáo trực tiếp cho (cấp trên)
vocab.example: In my current capacity, I report directly to the CEO regarding the progress of our international expansion.

vocab.meaning: gánh vác trọng trách/trách nhiệm nặng nề
vocab.example: During peak seasons, I often shoulder the burden of managing high-pressure deadlines and client expectations.
